Video.summary: Kandie was the guardian of Katie’s son who died at only 9 months. Katie thinks that Kandie was involved with his death, but Kandie claims she cared more for him than Katie did and even accuses her of selling him for $23 to her! Who’s responsible for the tragic death of the child?
Video.title: She Sold Her Baby for $23

Image.alt: She Sold Her Baby for $23
She Sold Her Baby for $23
She Sold Her Baby for $23

Video.summary: Kya is certain that John is the father. But John says he needs a DNA test because they had a short fling.
Video.title: Heart-Stopping DNA Results

Image.alt: Heart-Stopping DNA Results
Heart-Stopping DNA Results
Heart-Stopping DNA Results

Video.summary: After breaking up, Janell gave birth to their second child, but does not allow Rolando to be alone with the child because she believes that he abused their first baby. Then, Kayla is 14 years old and pregnant with Garret's child.
Video.title: Too Young to Be Parents

Image.alt: Too Young to Be Parents
Too Young to Be Parents
Too Young to Be Parents

Video.summary: Latoya is worried that her sister Tenielle’s boyfriend Ashley is molesting Tenielle’s 4 year old daughter! Latoya and the child’s father Antonio are here because they demand Ashley prove his innocence with a lie detector test!
Video.title: Explosive Lie Detector Results

Image.alt: Explosive Lie Detector Results
Explosive Lie Detector Results
Explosive Lie Detector Results

Video.summary: Tonya is here to stop her 14-year-old daughter Talia from ruining her life before she’s an adult. She doesn’t approve of her boyfriend Jerry who needs to get out of her daughter’s life because he’s responsible for everything that’s wrong with her.
Video.title: You’re Stealing My Daughter’s Childhood

Image.alt: You’re Stealing My Daughter’s Childhood
You’re Stealing My Daughter’s Childhood
You’re Stealing My Daughter’s Childhood

Video.summary: Seth kicked Byrnelle out a few months back because he was tired of her cheating. Is Steve able to help?
Video.title: What if She Is Your Daughter?

Image.alt: What if She Is Your Daughter?
What if She Is Your Daughter?
What if She Is Your Daughter?

Video.summary: Latonya says her wife told her she was raped and became pregnant with triplets, but doctors later said she was never pregnant.
Video.title: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Image.alt: Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?
Was My Wife Ever Pregnant With Triplets?

Video.summary: Taylor and Joseph admit to getting into violent arguments where he slapped, choked, scratched and even threw objects at her, but agree that if they can prove neither cheated, then their violent streak will end. But will it end?
Video.title: I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her

Image.alt: I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her
I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her
I'm Not Sorry I Beat Her

Video.summary: Sheila fears that her teen grand-daughter is having sex with a 26-year old family-friend. Then, Jaquella started dating her boyfriend Shaquille when he was a teen. Shaquille's mother is here to confront Jaquella for sleeping with her child.
Video.title: Why Are You Dating A Child?

Image.alt: Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?
Why Are You Dating A Child?

Video.summary: According to Drew, the baby was bottle-fed gin and died. Shawn, the grieving mother, claims she had no prior knowledge of the bottle containing gin and believes it was tampered with, possibly by her own sister and friend. Who’s responsible?
Video.title: A Fatal Mistake

Image.alt: A Fatal Mistake
A Fatal Mistake
A Fatal Mistake

Video.summary: Three years ago, Manny was accused of sexually molesting Elizabeth’s daughter. While he declares his innocence, Elizabeth has strong doubts and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is he innocent?
Video.title: A Mother’s Rage

Image.alt: A Mother’s Rage
A Mother’s Rage
A Mother’s Rage

Video.summary: Eric and Lisa are divorced and Eric is now dating Keri. Both Eric and Keri feel like Lisa is stalking them by sending him text messages and naked pictures. Then, Christopher has been unable to trust Olivia and thinks she may be cheating again.
Video.title: She's Stalking Us!

Image.alt: She's Stalking Us!
She's Stalking Us!
She's Stalking Us!

Video.summary: This mother is trying to regain custody of her daughter which she was convicted of abusing and neglecting. But Steve will not let her even get close to that child.
Video.title: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Image.alt: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Video.summary: Brandie is a 16 year old sex addict who claims to have slept with over 200 men. Steve enlists the help of Marvelyn, a woman who contracted HIV at the age of 19. Then, Shantaysia is 19 years old and works as a prostitute.
Video.title: Teen Sex and Prostitution

Image.alt: Teen Sex and Prostitution
Teen Sex and Prostitution
Teen Sex and Prostitution

Video.summary: Amber may not be the best mother, but her abusive boyfriend Alex is making their relationship and her son's upbringing, even worse. Then, David is desperate to get his kids back from ex-wife Fawn, who alleges David was an abusive father.
Video.title: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Image.alt: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Video.summary: Steve's guests are 3 students who survived a serious stigma on college campuses.
Video.title: College Life Uncovered Part 2

Image.alt: College Life Uncovered Part 2
College Life Uncovered Part 2
College Life Uncovered Part 2

Video.summary: Deon believes that Cassandra has been having sex with Josh and that she may be pregnant with his child!
Video.title: Are You Pregnant By My Brother?

Image.alt: Are You Pregnant By My Brother?
Are You Pregnant By My Brother?
Are You Pregnant By My Brother?

Video.summary: Ivette says she feels like a prisoner in her own home because her boyfriend controls every aspect of her life.
Video.title: Prisoners Have More Freedom Than You

Image.alt: Prisoners Have More Freedom Than You
Prisoners Have More Freedom Than You
Prisoners Have More Freedom Than You

Video.summary: Today, Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions.
Video.title: Steve – I Can’t Face the Truth

Image.alt: Steve – I Can’t Face the Truth
Steve – I Can’t Face the Truth
Steve – I Can’t Face the Truth

Video.summary: Eugene and Kendra are tired of being harassed by his ex who alleges he’s the father of her 3 children.
Video.title: Explosive Paternity Test Results

Image.alt: Explosive Paternity Test Results
Explosive Paternity Test Results
Explosive Paternity Test Results

Video.summary: Since he was 3 months old, Chris' grandmother raised and told him that his mother tried to drown him.
Video.title: You’ve Waited 17 Years, Here’s Your Results

Image.alt: You’ve Waited 17 Years, Here’s Your Results
You’ve Waited 17 Years, Here’s Your Results
You’ve Waited 17 Years, Here’s Your Results

Video.summary: Roxanne and Andrew have 2 children together, but she is cracking from the physical abuse. Andrew says he’s worried she’s been cheating on him and doesn’t know if the children are his! Can Steve’s test results save their relationship?
Video.title: Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage

Image.alt: Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage
Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage
Abusers Don’t Sit On My Stage

Video.summary: Alyssa refuses to marry Christian until he can prove his fidelity, but Christian says she is the cheater.
Video.title: I Caught Her Sending Naked Pictures

Image.alt: I Caught Her Sending Naked Pictures
I Caught Her Sending Naked Pictures
I Caught Her Sending Naked Pictures

Video.summary: Gina believes her grandson is being abused by her daughter's boyfriend Efrain. Her daughter wants to prove that he's innocent and is furious at her mom for accusing him. Was Gina right or is Efrain really innocent?
Video.title: How Could You Cover for Him?

Image.alt: How Could You Cover for Him?
How Could You Cover for Him?
How Could You Cover for Him?

Video.summary: Lorri is here because she believes that her grandson is being abused by his mother Alyssa and her ex-boyfriend Josh. She's here to find out the truth about whether or not they are really guilty of this abuse.
Video.title: Did You Bite and Beat My Son?

Image.alt: Did You Bite and Beat My Son?
Did You Bite and Beat My Son?
Did You Bite and Beat My Son?

Video.summary: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be a prostitute. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!
Video.title: A Shocking Betrayal

Image.alt: A Shocking Betrayal
A Shocking Betrayal
A Shocking Betrayal

Video.summary: Did Marcus’s ex’s boyfriend Charles molest their son? Ex Jamaica is torn between kicking out Charles for the meanwhile and wondering if Marcus’s girlfriend Tonya is lying to gain custody of the boy. What will Charles’s lie detector test say?
Video.title: A Mother's Wrath

Image.alt: A Mother's Wrath
A Mother's Wrath
A Mother's Wrath

Video.summary: The laziest husband and wife lie about their child in order to get support from a woman who believes the child is her grandchild.
Video.title: He's Not Your Son

Image.alt: He's Not Your Son
He's Not Your Son
He's Not Your Son

Video.summary: Adrianna says her ex-fiancé is verbally and physically abusive, but he says he had every right to treat her that way to put her in her place.
Video.title: She Deserves It

Image.alt: She Deserves It
She Deserves It
She Deserves It

Video.summary: Jesus is worried that Sonja is sleeping with other men in exchange for Cocaine. Then, Jessica is desperate to change Josh's controlling and abusive ways. She says she can no longer live with Josh if he's going to continue threatening her and accusing her of prostitution.
Video.title: Is My Wife A Prostitute

Image.alt: Is My Wife A Prostitute
Is My Wife A Prostitute
Is My Wife A Prostitute

Video.summary: Maria's fiance texts their ex-roommate, saying he wants to leave Maria and be with her; Lisa has lost four jobs because her partner overzealously tries to prevent her from cheating on him.
Video.title: He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw

Image.alt: He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw
He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw
He Says I'm Crazy, But I Know What I Saw

Video.summary: Pregnant Natasha kicked out her children's father because she suspects he is cheating, possibly with a member of his own family; Aaron denies being his fiancee's baby's dad.
Video.title: You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?

Image.alt: You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
You Slept With The Man Who Shot Your Boyfriend?
